name: coingecko_price
description: Get real-time cryptocurrency prices, market caps, 24-hour volume, and price change from CoinGecko.

vs_currencies.description: Comma-separated quote currencies (for example, 'usd,twd,jpy,eur'). Defaults to 'usd' when omitted.

include_market_cap.description: Include market cap data when true.

include_24hr_change.description: Include 24-hour price change percentage when true.

include_last_updated_at.description: Include last updated Unix timestamp when true.
